task.title: Implement SaaS dashboard authentication
task.summary: SaaS dashboard authentication via OAuth 2.0 + PKCE. Callback handler and token exchange are the immediate focus; session middleware and tests follow.
task.author: minimax
task.goal: Add secure OAuth-based login and session management for the dashboard.
task.next: Start implementation with the OAuth callback handler and authorization code-to-token exchange (PKCE verifier validation, token storage); once tokens are issued, build session middleware that validates the issued token on each protected dashboard request, and then add integration tests covering the OAuth callback and session lifecycle.
